name: open-face
description: Animated faces for AI agents — protocol, renderer, server

scripts.build: bun run build:element && bun run build:server && bun run build:edge && bun run build:site
scripts.build:element: bun build packages/element/src/index.ts --outdir packages/element/dist --target browser --minify --entry-naming open-face.js
scripts.build:server: cp packages/element/dist/open-face.js packages/server/public/ && rm -rf packages/server/public/faces && mkdir -p packages/server/public/faces && cp -r faces/* packages/server/public/faces/
scripts.build:edge: mkdir -p packages/server-edge/public && cp packages/element/dist/open-face.js packages/server-edge/public/ && rm -rf packages/server-edge/public/faces && mkdir -p packages/server-edge/public/faces && cp -r faces/* packages/server-edge/public/faces/
scripts.build:site: test -d site && cp packages/element/dist/open-face.js site/ && rm -rf site/faces && mkdir -p site/faces && cp -r faces/* site/faces/ || true
scripts.dev: bun run build:element && bun run build:server && bun packages/server/src/index.ts
scripts.test: bun test packages/renderer/test/ packages/server/test/ packages/server-edge/test/ packages/filter/test/ packages/client/test/ packages/mcp/test/ && bun test packages/plugin/test/
scripts.qa:release: bun run qa:builder && bun run qa:parity && bun run qa:faces:capture
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun run deploy:site && bun run deploy:product
